answers.question: First generator target for #932
answers.answer: Both schema (JSON Schema → Rust struct) and rest-api (OpenAPI → Axum route handler skeleton) for Axum target. FastAPI also in scope.

answers.question: Template file embedding vs filesystem
answers.answer: Embedded via include_str! in crates/cclab-sdd/templates/. No runtime file dependency.

answers.question: SpecBundle cross-section composition scope
answers.answer: Phase 1 only (single-section codegen). Phase 2 SpecBundle cross-section composition deferred.

answers.question: cclab-probe integration for #933
answers.answer: Standalone test files only. No cclab-probe integration. Probe is deferred.
